---
name: Bug report
about: The command produced wrong or unwanted agent behavior
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**What happened**
Describe what the agent did that it shouldn't have (e.g. skipped the failing-baseline check, wrote a spec file into the repo, declared completion without the harness passing).

**Which phase**
Phase 0 (tracker discovery) / Phase 1 (spec) / Phase 2 (harness) / Phase 3 (implementation) / Phase 4 (termination).

**Repo/language context**
What kind of project were you running this against? (language, tracker used, CI setup, etc.)

**Expected behavior**
What should the agent have done instead?
